name: Spectral Vocoder
description:
This algorithm implements a vocoder. The spectral characteristics of the modulator input are applied to the carrier input. In classic usage, the modulator might be a human voice, and the carrier might be a synth sound, or simply noise.

This version uses a digital, FFT-based, method. There is also the Vocoder (below) which uses a more traditional bandpass filter approach.
gui_description: The display shows the frequency spectrum of the output signal. It also shows the current FFT size, and the module’s total CPU usage (NB not the algorithm’s CPU usage, the total usage).

specifications.name: Stereo
specifications.description: Whether the algorithm is mono or stereo.

parameters.name: Latency
parameters.description: Sets the processing latency (which indirectly sets the FFT size).

parameters.name: Sample rate
parameters.description: Sets the sample rate reduction (which indirectly sets the FFT size, and affects the bandwidth).

parameters.name: Enable
parameters.description: Enables per-band envelope trackers; effectively slew rate limiters for the band amplitudes.

parameters.name: Attack
parameters.description: The attack time; exponential scaling from 1ms to 1s.

parameters.name: Release
parameters.description: The release time; exponential scaling from 10ms to 30s.

parameters.name: Dry gain
parameters.description: The output level of the dry signal.

parameters.name: Wet gain
parameters.description: The output level of the wet (vocoder) signal.

parameters.name: Output mode
parameters.description: The standard Add/Replace mode selector as described above.

input_ports.name: Carrier left/mono input
input_ports.description: The left or mono input audio for the carrier signal.

input_ports.name: Carrier right input
input_ports.description: The right input audio for the carrier signal.

input_ports.name: Modulator input
input_ports.description: The bus to use for the modulator signal.

input_ports.name: Carrier left/mono input
input_ports.description: The left or mono input audio bus for the carrier signal.

input_ports.name: Carrier right input
input_ports.description: The right input audio bus for the carrier (if the algorithm is set to stereo in the specifications).

output_ports.name: Left/mono output
output_ports.description: The left or mono output audio.

output_ports.name: Left/mono output
output_ports.description: The left or mono output audio bus.

output_ports.name: Right output
output_ports.description: The right output audio bus (if the algorithm is set to stereo in the specifications).
